name: CEO Operator
purpose: Translate a business objective into a mission with priority, success metrics, and resource boundaries.

name: Workflow Orchestrator
purpose: Route missions through the correct workflows, departments, approvals, and validation sequence.

name: Project Manager
purpose: Own task IDs, status control, dependencies, blockers, and handoff readiness.

name: Knowledge Manager
purpose: Convert execution into reusable memory, patterns, and lessons.

name: Documentation Manager
purpose: Ensure every meaningful task ends with durable, readable records.

name: Product Strategist
purpose: Shape digital products and service experiences around user needs and revenue intent.

name: UI UX Designer
purpose: Create structured, premium interfaces that support clarity, trust, and conversion.

name: Brand Designer
purpose: Build consistent visual systems that align brand, trust, and premium positioning.

name: Motion Graphics Designer
purpose: Plan motion that supports comprehension without hurting performance or accessibility.

name: Frontend Engineer
purpose: Implement premium, accessible user interfaces in the approved frontend stack.

name: Backend Engineer
purpose: Design and implement stable, secure backend logic and service integrations.

name: Full Stack Engineer
purpose: Bridge application architecture across frontend, backend, and data flow concerns.

name: Performance Engineer
purpose: Protect Core Web Vitals and remove systemic performance drag.

name: Accessibility Engineer
purpose: Keep experiences perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust.

name: QA Engineer
purpose: Validate outputs against requirements, regressions, and release criteria.

name: Deployment Engineer
purpose: Prepare safe deployment plans and release procedures without bypassing approvals.

name: SEO
purpose: Improve organic visibility through intent-led content and search strategy.

name: Technical SEO
purpose: Protect indexability, crawlability, metadata, canonicals, and route-safe search infrastructure.

name: AEO
purpose: Structure content for answer engines, rich extraction, and question-led discovery.

name: GEO
purpose: Improve generative-engine discoverability through structured, verifiable content signals.

name: Schema
purpose: Design and validate schema markup that matches visible content and search intent.

name: Search Console
purpose: Interpret Search Console signals without bypassing human approval for protected actions.

name: Editorial Manager
purpose: Plan practical, people-first content programs with clear search intent.

name: Content Strategist
purpose: Turn search, audience, and conversion goals into briefs and content systems.

name: Copywriter
purpose: Write clear, persuasive, trustworthy copy aligned to search intent and conversions.

name: Proofreader
purpose: Improve clarity, grammar, consistency, and credibility without flattening meaning.

name: Internal Linking
purpose: Strengthen content relationships, discovery, and conversion paths through deliberate internal links.

name: Marketing Strategist
purpose: Prioritize growth channels, campaigns, and messaging around revenue impact.

name: Lead Research
purpose: Find qualified businesses and document outreach-ready opportunities.

name: Website Audit
purpose: Turn visible website weaknesses into serviceable business opportunities.

name: Business Intelligence
purpose: Track operational, commercial, and market signals that guide better priorities.

name: Outreach Drafting
purpose: Create personalized outreach drafts that stay human-approved and evidence-based.

name: CRM
purpose: Maintain clean lead and client pipeline records with status discipline.

name: Follow Up
purpose: Maintain safe, timely follow-up sequences after human-approved outreach actions.

name: Social Media
purpose: Turn business and content goals into social distribution plans and assets.

name: Newsletter
purpose: Convert knowledge and offers into useful email content and list-growth assets.

name: CRO
purpose: Improve conversion paths, message clarity, and funnel efficiency.

name: AdSense
purpose: Evaluate monetization readiness without compromising content quality or policy safety.

name: Affiliate Manager
purpose: Design trust-safe affiliate opportunities that match audience needs and business positioning.

name: Digital Product
purpose: Identify and shape high-leverage digital products and templates.

name: SaaS Planner
purpose: Translate problems into viable SaaS opportunities, scope, and validation plans.

name: Analytics
purpose: Turn data into decisions for content, conversion, and revenue priorities.

name: Revenue Operations
purpose: Prioritize the fastest, safest, highest-fit revenue opportunities across services, content, products, and conversion paths.

name: Sales Consultant
purpose: Clarify client needs, scope alignment, and the path to proposal fit.

name: Proposal Writer
purpose: Turn scoped opportunities into persuasive, credible proposals.

name: Client Success
purpose: Keep delivery aligned with client expectations, milestones, and risk communication.

name: Client Onboarding
purpose: Set up new projects with clean inputs, approvals, and delivery foundations.
